title: Ubiquiti UBB-XG, UniFi Building to Building Bridge XG
description: UniFi Building to Building Bridge XG is a very compact 60 GHz point-to-point (PtP) device with support for 802.11ad/ay standards and built-in 5 GHz backup (WiFi 5 - 802.11ac) from Ubiquiti with a range of 500 m+ is ideal for connecting two buildings for a short distance. The device is equipped with a Gigabit LAN port with PoE support, one SFP+ port and Bluetooth for easy setup from a mobile via UniFi Network application . The device only supports bridge mode and supports both 2160 and 4320 MHz… Compact dimensions - 192 Ã 192 Ã 59 mm 60GHz spectrum with low interference - 58 to 64 GHz Range 500 m+ Throughput 6 Gbps in 60 GHz, 866 Mbps in the 5 GHz band Supports channel bonding higher throughput - 2160 and 4320 MHz Supported channels: 58320, 59400, 60480, 61560, 62640, 63720, 64800 - depends on the place of use Gigabit LAN port with passive PoE support (48V DC), max. consumption 31.2W Settings via UniFi Network application from version 6.3 (2) Device (2) Fine Tuning Bracket (2) 48V/0.65A PoE power adapter (2) Power cord
specsSearch: Wireless features Channel bandwidth [MHz] 2160, 4320 WiFi standards 802.11ad, 802.11ay, 802.11ac Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 60GHz [Mb/s] 6000 Security WPA2 AES Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps Other features Bluetooth Power Power over Ethernet 802.3bt, 48V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 31 Physical characteristics Protection class IPX6 Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 55 Weight [g] 1700 Width [mm] 159 Height [mm] 159 Depth [mm] 59
